title: noccaea aptera
intro: Noccaea aptera, also known as the wingless wintercress, is a perennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Noccaea aptera include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Noccaea aptera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
